requirement_topic.en: AZSTAND Mandatory Conformity Assessment — National Regime (Non-EAEU)
requirement_topic.zh: AZSTAND强制合格评定——国家制度（非EAEU）
requirement_topic.zht: AZSTAND強制合格評定——國家制度（非EAEU）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Azerbaijani market that fall within the scope of regulated products must undergo mandatory conformity assessment under the AZSTAND (State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control / standardization) regime. Azerbaijan is NOT a member of the Eurasian Economic Union （EAEU）— it operates a national conformity regime, so an EAEU Conformity （EAC）certificate / declaration and the EAC mark do not by themselves grant access to the Azerbaijani market. Conformity is demonstrated against adopted AZS standards, which in turn adopt international IEC （and in some legacy cases GOST）documents — for refrigerators the safety basis is AZS/IEC 60335-2-24. Depending on the product, conformity may take the form of a certificate of conformity or a declaration of conformity recognised by AZSTAND, supported by test evidence referencing the applicable AZS/IEC standards. An in-country importer or authorised representative is typically required to hold documentation and present products for clearance.
summary.zh: 投放阿塞拜疆市场、属于受管制产品范围的家用制冷器具，须在AZSTAND（反垄断与消费市场监管国家局/标准化）制度下进行强制合格评定。阿塞拜疆非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员国——其实行国家合格评定制度，故EAEU合格（EAC）证书/声明及EAC标志本身不构成进入阿塞拜疆市场的资格。合格评定须依据所采用的AZS标准证明，而AZS标准又采用国际IEC（部分历史情形为GOST）文件——电冰箱方面安全依据为AZS/IEC 60335-2-24。视产品而定，合格评定可采取AZSTAND认可的合格证书或合格声明形式，并以引用适用AZS/IEC标准的检测证据为支撑。通常须由在地进口商或授权代表持有文件并提交产品供清关。
summary.zht: 投放亞塞拜然市場、屬於受管制產品範圍的家用製冷器具，須在AZSTAND（反壟斷與消費市場監管國家局/標準化）制度下進行強制合格評定。亞塞拜然非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員國——其實行國家合格評定制度，故EAEU合格（EAC）證書/聲明及EAC標誌本身不構成進入亞塞拜然市場的資格。合格評定須依據所採用的AZS標準證明，而AZS標準又採用國際IEC（部分歷史情形為GOST）文件——電冰箱方面安全依據為AZS/IEC 60335-2-24。視產品而定，合格評定可採取AZSTAND認可的合格證書或合格聲明形式，並以引用適用AZS/IEC標準的檢測證據為支撐。通常須由在地進口商或授權代表持有文件並提交產品供清關。

standards_or_laws: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control / standardization — mandatory conformity assessment for regulated products
AZS adoption of IEC 60335-2-24 — safety of refrigerating appliances （conformity basis）
Azerbaijan national conformity regime — NOT EAEU; EAC certification / EAC mark not accepted as substitute
In-country importer / authorised representative — required to hold documentation and present products for customs clearance

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification （CCC）covering both safety （GB 4706.13）and EMC （GB 4343.1）before sale. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies （CABs）. Energy labelling （China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2）is a separate mandatory requirement administered by NDRC/SAMR. There is no single Azerbaijan-equivalent national conformity mark in China: CCC covers safety/EMC and the China Energy Label covers energy, and these are separately issued. CCC certification is valid only for the Chinese domestic market and does not confer Azerbaijani conformity.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）审核。能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的独立强制性要求。中国没有单一等同于阿塞拜疆的国家合格标志：CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效，两者分别颁发。CCC认证仅对中国国内市场有效，不构成阿塞拜疆合格评定。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）審核。能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）是由NDRC/SAMR管理的獨立強制性要求。中國沒有單一等同於亞塞拜然的國家合格標誌：CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效，兩者分別頒發。CCC認證僅對中國國內市場有效，不構成亞塞拜然合格評定。

standards_or_laws: CCC （China Compulsory Certification）— safety （GB 4706.13）+ EMC （GB 4343.1）; mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels （NDRC/SAMR）; based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build an Azerbaijani conformity package — CCC does not substitute: (1) Conformity assessment under AZSTAND — a certificate or declaration of conformity recognised by AZSTAND, supported by test evidence referencing AZS/IEC 60335-2-24 （safety）and AZS/CISPR 14 （EMC）; Chinese CCC reports are not automatically accepted and may need re-presentation, supplementation, or re-issuance through an AZSTAND-recognised path. (2) Regime distinction — exporters must NOT assume an EAEU EAC certificate suffices, because Azerbaijan is not an EAEU member; EAC and AZSTAND conformity are separate. (3) In-country importer / authorised representative — typically required to hold the technical documentation, present goods for customs clearance at Caspian ports （Baku）, and act as the responsible operator. (4) Product marking and accompanying documentation per Azerbaijani requirements （rating plate, language, importer details）. The exact list of regulated products, conformity form （certificate vs declaration）, and accepted test-report provenance should be confirmed with AZSTAND or a local conformity body before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立阿塞拜疆合格评定文件包——CCC不能替代：（1）AZSTAND制度下的合格评定——AZSTAND认可的合格证书或合格声明，以引用AZS/IEC 60335-2-24（安全）及AZS/CISPR 14（电磁兼容）的检测证据为支撑；中国CCC报告不被自动接受，可能须通过AZSTAND认可路径重新提交、补充或重新签发。（2）制度区分——出口商不得假定EAEU EAC证书足够，因阿塞拜疆非EAEU成员国；EAC与AZSTAND合格评定相互独立。（3）在地进口商/授权代表——通常须持有技术文件、在里海港口（巴库）提交货物清关，并担任责任运营商。（4）依据阿塞拜疆要求的产品标识及随附文件（铭牌、语言、进口商信息）。受管制产品的确切清单、合格评定形式（证书或声明）及可接受的检测报告来源，应在出货前与AZSTAND或当地合格评定机构确认。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立亞塞拜然合格評定文件包——CCC不能替代：（1）AZSTAND制度下的合格評定——AZSTAND認可的合格證書或合格聲明，以引用AZS/IEC 60335-2-24（安全）及AZS/CISPR 14（電磁相容）的檢測證據為支撐；中國CCC報告不被自動接受，可能須通過AZSTAND認可路徑重新提交、補充或重新簽發。（2）制度區分——出口商不得假定EAEU EAC證書足夠，因亞塞拜然非EAEU成員國；EAC與AZSTAND合格評定相互獨立。（3）在地進口商/授權代表——通常須持有技術文件、在裏海港口（巴庫）提交貨物清關，並擔任責任運營商。（4）依據亞塞拜然要求的產品標識及隨附文件（銘牌、語言、進口商資訊）。受管制產品的確切清單、合格評定形式（證書或聲明）及可接受的檢測報告來源，應在出貨前與AZSTAND或當地合格評定機構確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated products — conformity assessment under AZSTAND required before market placement; EAEU EAC certification is NOT accepted （national, non-EAEU regime）
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification （safety + EMC）+ China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AZSTAND mandatory conformity assessment is required for regulated household refrigerators in Azerbaijan, demonstrated against adopted AZS/IEC standards. Chinese CCC certification does not substitute, and because Azerbaijan is NOT an EAEU member, an EAC certificate also does not suffice. An in-country importer or authorised representative is typically needed for documentation and customs clearance. Confirm the regulated-product scope and conformity form with AZSTAND before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿塞拜疆受管制家用电冰箱须经AZSTAND强制合格评定，依据所采用的AZS/IEC标准证明。中国CCC认证不能替代；且因阿塞拜疆非EAEU成员国，EAC证书亦不足够。通常须在地进口商或授权代表负责文件与清关。出货前应与AZSTAND确认受管制产品范围及合格评定形式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞塞拜然受管制家用電冰箱須經AZSTAND強制合格評定，依據所採用的AZS/IEC標準證明。中國CCC認證不能替代；且因亞塞拜然非EAEU成員國，EAC證書亦不足夠。通常須在地進口商或授權代表負責文件與清關。出貨前應與AZSTAND確認受管制產品範圍及合格評定形式。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer / Responsible Representative and Caspian Port Clearance
requirement_topic.zh: 在地进口商/责任代表与里海港口清关
requirement_topic.zht: 在地進口商/責任代表與裏海港口清關

summary.en: For household refrigerating appliances manufactured outside Azerbaijan （including China）, an in-country importer or responsible representative established in Azerbaijan is typically required to place goods on the market. This entity: holds or has access to the conformity documentation （AZSTAND certificate / declaration and supporting AZS/IEC test evidence）; presents goods for customs clearance — sea freight typically arrives via the Caspian Sea port of Baku, while overland routes also serve the market; and acts as the responsible operator for product compliance and for cooperation with the AZSTAND market-control authority. Because Azerbaijan operates a national regime, the importer role and the conformity documents must be Azerbaijan-specific; an EAEU importer arrangement or EAC documentation does not transfer. Import and customs procedures, product registration where applicable, and any required Azerbaijani-language documentation should be arranged with the in-country importer before shipment.
summary.zh: 对于阿塞拜疆境外（包括中国）制造的家用制冷器具，通常须由在阿塞拜疆设立的在地进口商或责任代表将货物投放市场。该实体：持有或能够访问合格评定文件（AZSTAND证书/声明及支撑性AZS/IEC检测证据）；提交货物清关——海运通常经里海巴库港抵达，陆路通道亦服务该市场；并担任产品合规及配合AZSTAND市场监管机构的责任运营商。由于阿塞拜疆实行国家制度，进口商角色及合格评定文件须为阿塞拜疆专用；EAEU进口商安排或EAC文件不可转用。进口及海关程序、适用情形下的产品注册，以及任何要求的阿塞拜疆语文件，应在出货前与在地进口商安排。
summary.zht: 對於亞塞拜然境外（包括中國）製造的家用製冷器具，通常須由在亞塞拜然設立的在地進口商或責任代表將貨物投放市場。該實體：持有或能夠訪問合格評定文件（AZSTAND證書/聲明及支撐性AZS/IEC檢測證據）；提交貨物清關——海運通常經裏海巴庫港抵達，陸路通道亦服務該市場；並擔任產品合規及配合AZSTAND市場監管機構的責任運營商。由於亞塞拜然實行國家制度，進口商角色及合格評定文件須為亞塞拜然專用；EAEU進口商安排或EAC文件不可轉用。進口及海關程序、適用情形下的產品註冊，以及任何要求的亞塞拜然語文件，應在出貨前與在地進口商安排。

standards_or_laws: Azerbaijan national import / customs procedures — in-country importer or responsible representative required for placing goods on the market
Port of Baku （Caspian Sea）— primary sea-freight entry point; overland routes also serve the market
AZSTAND — market-control authority for conformity of regulated products

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring manufacturers of export-bound products to designate a destination-country resident legal representative responsible for product compliance and market-surveillance cooperation. Chinese export manufacturers typically appoint overseas distributors or trading companies on a commercial basis. Under the CCC domestic regime, the certification holder is the responsible party for domestic market compliance — this role does not extend to or satisfy Azerbaijani import / conformity requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口产品制造商指定一名在目的国境内居住、负责产品合规及配合市场监管的法定代表人。中国出口制造商通常以商业形式委任海外经销商或贸易公司。在CCC国内制度下，认证持有人为国内市场合规的责任方——该角色不延伸至阿塞拜疆进口/合格评定要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口產品製造商指定一名在目的國境內居住、負責產品合規及配合市場監管的法定代表人。中國出口製造商通常以商業形式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司。在CCC國內制度下，認證持有人為國內市場合規的責任方——該角色不延伸至亞塞拜然進口/合格評定要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for an in-country importer / responsible representative obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. Chinese refrigerator manufacturers must arrange an in-country Azerbaijani importer or responsible representative before goods are placed on the market: (1) the importer holds the AZSTAND conformity documentation and supporting AZS/IEC test evidence and presents goods for customs clearance （typically via the Caspian port of Baku）; (2) the importer/representative acts as the responsible operator toward the AZSTAND market-control authority; (3) because Azerbaijan is non-EAEU, an EAEU importer arrangement and EAC documentation do not transfer — Azerbaijan-specific arrangements are needed. Without a recognised in-country importer/representative and valid AZSTAND conformity documents, regulated appliances cannot be cleared and lawfully placed on the Azerbaijani market. Confirm the exact importer obligations, product registration （if applicable）, and language/marking requirements with the importer and AZSTAND before shipment.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商须在货物投放市场前安排在地阿塞拜疆进口商或责任代表：（1）进口商持有AZSTAND合格评定文件及支撑性AZS/IEC检测证据，并提交货物清关（通常经里海巴库港）；（2）进口商/代表担任面向AZSTAND市场监管机构的责任运营商；（3）由于阿塞拜疆非EAEU，EAEU进口商安排及EAC文件不可转用——须采用阿塞拜疆专用安排。在缺少受认可的在地进口商/代表及有效AZSTAND合格评定文件的情况下，受管制器具无法清关并合法投放阿塞拜疆市场。出货前应与进口商及AZSTAND确认确切的进口商义务、产品注册（如适用）及语言/标识要求。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商須在貨物投放市場前安排在地亞塞拜然進口商或責任代表：（1）進口商持有AZSTAND合格評定文件及支撐性AZS/IEC檢測證據，並提交貨物清關（通常經裏海巴庫港）；（2）進口商/代表擔任面向AZSTAND市場監管機構的責任運營商；（3）由於亞塞拜然非EAEU，EAEU進口商安排及EAC文件不可轉用——須採用亞塞拜然專用安排。在缺少受認可的在地進口商/代表及有效AZSTAND合格評定文件的情況下，受管制器具無法清關並合法投放亞塞拜然市場。出貨前應與進口商及AZSTAND確認確切的進口商義務、產品註冊（如適用）及語言/標識要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — an in-country importer / responsible representative is typically required to clear and place goods on the Azerbaijani market; EAEU importer arrangements / EAC documentation do not transfer （national regime）
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a destination-country responsible representative under Chinese law

source.publisher: AZSTAND — State Service for Antimonopoly and Consumer Market Control (Azerbaijan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers typically need an in-country Azerbaijani importer or responsible representative to hold AZSTAND conformity documentation and clear goods （commonly via the Caspian port of Baku）. Because Azerbaijan is non-EAEU, an EAEU importer arrangement and EAC documents do not transfer. Confirm importer obligations, any product registration, and language/marking requirements with the importer and AZSTAND before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱制造商通常须在地阿塞拜疆进口商或责任代表持有AZSTAND合格评定文件并清关（通常经里海巴库港）。由于阿塞拜疆非EAEU，EAEU进口商安排及EAC文件不可转用。出货前应与进口商及AZSTAND确认进口商义务、任何产品注册及语言/标识要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱製造商通常須在地亞塞拜然進口商或責任代表持有AZSTAND合格評定文件並清關（通常經裏海巴庫港）。由於亞塞拜然非EAEU，EAEU進口商安排及EAC文件不可轉用。出貨前應與進口商及AZSTAND確認進口商義務、任何產品註冊及語言/標識要求。
